description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a bold gradient color scheme transitioning from deep black at the toe to a vibrant red at the heel. The shoe features bright red laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, threaded through black eyelets. The toe cap and sole are white, providing a striking contrast to the upper. On the inner side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in white, black, and red. The shoe appears to be made primarily of synthetic or canvas material with a rubber sole, and the interior is hollow for foot insertion. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear in city environments.
description: A high-top sneaker with a black-to-red gradient upper, red criss-cross laces, white toe cap and sole, and a visible Converse All Star logo patch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded black toe cap, white sole, and red criss-cross laces dominating the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth gradient from black to red, red laces, and the clean white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid red heel with a black vertical stripe running down the center.
description_view_3: Right side view features the Converse All Star logo patch, the gradient color transition, and the full lace pattern.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner side, white with black and red details
